summary: Handheld phone footage shot inside a multi-level public building with stairs and large windows, carrying a 'KAPWING' watermark in the corner. A group of people, several wearing masks and tactical vests, move down a staircase and across a tiled lobby, with one person escorted in the middle. Later frames show masked officers in tactical gear near a revolving glass door. The camera moves and reframes throughout.

script.scene: A cluster of people, several masked and in tactical vests, descend a staircase escorting a person in a white shirt; bystanders watch.
An older man in an orange jacket walks across the tiled lobby as others pass; a person in a hooded jacket is nearby.
Masked officers in tactical gear stand near a revolving glass door, one carrying a bag, with a bystander at right.
